text: NHC operates multiple skilled nursing facilities, assisted living and independent living communities, as well as homecare and hospice agencies within this geographic footprint.

Since we were already operating and offering many health care service lines, including assisted living, homecare, hospice, and behavioral health, within this geographic footprint, the acquisition also enhances and complements that continuum of care, Dr.

NHC affiliates also operate 26 assisted living communities with 1,413 units, nine independent living communities with 775 units, three behavioral health hospitals, 34 homecare agencies, and 33 hospice agencies.
